posts.title: Three nights, one big Sunday. Here's the shape of it.
know: The 54th Classic runs over the Australia Day long weekend — two preliminary nights then the 40-lap final on Sunday.
Gates open around 3pm each day with cars on track from about 5pm; get in early for the good grandstand seats.
The 2027 final pays $75,000 to win — expect a full international and interstate field of 100+ cars.
Camping and reserved seating book out ahead of time — sort tickets through the club before you travel.
body: Dates and times on this page are provisional until Premier Speedway posts the official Classic timetable. When they do, this page follows.
